parsed.production_notes: This is a standard 2D vector animation created by human animators. There are no generative AI artifacts present.

characters.appearance: Stylized 2D animated brown bear. It has a round body, small ears, and simple facial features with black eyes and a black nose.
characters.wardrobe: A light blue scarf or towel draped around its neck.

scenes.setting: Stylized 2D beach with tan sand, blue ocean, and light blue sky.

panels.panel_visual_description: A 2D animated brown bear stands centered on a stylized beach. The background consists of tan sand at the bottom, a blue ocean with wavy white lines in the middle, and a light blue sky above. The bear has its arms crossed and wears a light blue scarf. The bear's mouth moves as it speaks.

scenes.visual_description: The scene features a 2D animated bear standing on a beach. The Duolingo logo is visible at the top. Text appears above the bear, matching the spoken audio. The bear speaks cheerfully throughout the clip.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: I've been learning Spanish on Duolingo, for free. [I've been learning Spanish on Duolingo, for free.]
Character A says: ¡Me encanta la playa! [I love the beach!]
